case_title: CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR VS. DASHON NELSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-20-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD-SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,585.00 FILED BY CCSF - OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, DASHON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN WEIGARTEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
